title: 假設語氣（與過去相反）If + S + had p.p....

formulas.formula: If + S + had p.p., S + would/could/might + have p.p.
formulas.zh: 如果（過去）...，（過去）就會/能/可能...

formulas.formula: Had S + p.p., S + would/could/might + have p.p.
formulas.zh: 倒裝形式：若省略 if，had 須前置於主詞

explanation: 第三條件句用於表達與過去事實相反的假設。if 子句使用過去完成式（had + p.p.），表示過去未曾發生的事；主句用 would/could/might + have + p.p.，表示過去本可能發生但未發生的結果。若省略 if，需使用倒裝語序（Had + S）。此句型常與第二條件句混合，表達多層次的假設情境。注意：不可使用 will have 或 can have 在主句中。

examples.eng: If I had studied harder, I would have passed the exam.
examples.chi: 如果我當時用功讀書，我就會通過考試了。

examples.eng: Had she known the truth earlier, she could have made a better decision.
examples.chi: 要是她早知道真相，她本來可以做出更好的決定。

examples.eng: If we hadn't missed the flight, we might have arrived on time.
examples.chi: 如果我們沒有錯過班機，我們可能已經準時到達了。

examples.eng: Had you listened to my advice, you wouldn't have regretted it now.
examples.chi: 要是你當時聽我的建議，你現在就不會後悔了。

extension.tip: 判斷第三條件句的關鍵：時間詞為過去（yesterday、at that time、then）且事實未發生。常見錯誤是在主句用 will have（應用 would have）或在 if 子句用 would have（應用 had p.p.）。倒裝形式 Had S 後接 p.p.，主句結構不變。

examples.test: If I would have known → If I had known
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤：if 子句不可用 would have，只能用 had p.p.

examples.test: If you had told me, I will help you → If you had told me, I would have helped you
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤：主句須用過去時態 would have，不能用 will

examples.test: Had I known earlier, I could have changed my plan.
examples.result: ✓ 正確：倒裝形式，Had + S + p.p. 表省略 if

extension.note: 三條件句口訣：『過過會』— if 子句用過去完成，主句用 would/could/might + have。

parts: the warning, he would have avoided the accident.
exercises.sentence: If he had heeded the warning, he would have avoided the accident.
exercises.translation: 如果他當時留意警告，他就會避免那場事故了。

parts: the project been completed on time, the company wouldn't have lost that contract.
exercises.sentence: Had the project been completed on time, the company wouldn't have lost that contract.
exercises.translation: 要是那個項目按時完成，公司就不會失去那份合約了。

parts: If I had taken your advice, I
exercises.sentence: If I had taken your advice, I wouldn't have made such a costly mistake.
exercises.translation: 如果我當時採納你的建議，我就不會犯這麼昂貴的錯誤了。

parts: that chance if she had been more confident back then.
exercises.sentence: She could have seized that chance if she had been more confident back then.
exercises.translation: 如果她當時更有自信，她本來可以抓住那個機會的。

vocab_table.zh: 本來可以做；當時能夠做

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的第三條件句形式，表達與過去相反的假設
mc_exercises.question_eng: If he _______ the warning, he would not have made that mistake.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第三條件句的 if 子句需用過去完成式 had + p.p.。A 正確。B 為簡單過去式，表示簡單事實；C 為現在完成式，時態不符；D 為助動詞 would，不能用於 if 子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成第三條件句主句，使用正確的助動詞形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: If you had arrived on time, you _______ the important announcement.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第三條件句主句應使用 would/could/might + have + p.p. 表過去本可發生但未發生。B 正確。A 缺少 have；C 使用 will have，不符第三條件句；D 為簡單未來式，時態錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 使用倒裝語序改寫第三條件句，選擇正確形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ known about the accident earlier, we could have helped them immediately.
mc_exercises.explanation: 省略 if 時需使用倒裝語序 Had + S + p.p.。B 正確。A 保留了 if，不是倒裝；C 使用現在完成式，不符；D 為一般倒裝疑問句形式，不符文意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 識別並修正混合條件句中，表達多層次假設的正確形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: If she had not been afraid of failure back then, she _______ her own business by now and _______ more successful.

options.text: will have started; would have been
would have started; would have been

mc_exercises.explanation: 混合條件句：前半部對過去相反（if had...），需要 would have started；後半部表現在結果（by now），需要 would be（第二條件句形式）。A 正確地結合兩個不同時間點。B、C、D 時態搭配都不恰當。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果你昨天沒有遲到，就不會被老師罵。
translation_exercises.answer: If you hadn't been late yesterday, you wouldn't have been scolded by your teacher.
key_points: wouldn't have been scolded (主句結構)
時間副詞 yesterday 表示過去事實
hints: 提示1：if 子句用 had + p.p.，主句用 would + have + p.p.，兩者時態配合
提示2：常見錯誤是在主句用 will have 或 would be scolded，記得必須是 would have been scolded

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果我有認真讀書，我就能通過那次數學考試。
translation_exercises.answer: If I had studied hard, I could have passed the math exam.
key_points: had studied (過去完成式表示未曾發生)
could have passed (表示過去曾可能的結果)
study 與 pass 的因果邏輯
hints: 提示1：主句用 could/might + have + p.p. 表達過去本可能但未發生的結果
提示2：注意 could have 和 would have 的差異——could 強調'有能力'，would 強調'必然結果'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 要不是你提醒我帶傘，我就會在雨中淋濕了。
translation_exercises.answer: Had you not reminded me to bring an umbrella, I would have gotten wet in the rain.
key_points: Had you not reminded (倒裝結構，省略 if)
to bring 不定詞作提醒內容
hints: 提示1：省略 if 需使用倒裝語序 Had + S + p.p.，功能與 If I had not been reminded... 相同
提示2：倒裝時注意否定詞的位置（Had you not / Hadn't you），避免寫成 Did you not remind

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 如果我的朋友沒有在升學考試前夕告訴我那個重要的考試技巧，我就可能考不上理想的大學。
translation_exercises.answer: If my friend hadn't told me that important exam technique before the entrance exam, I might not have gotten into my ideal university.
key_points: hadn't told (過去完成式，過去未曾發生的事)
might have gotten (表示過去較不確定的可能結果)
複雜時間背景 (before the entrance exam) 與假設的層次
hints: 提示1：might have + p.p. 比 would have 語氣更不確定，適合表達不確定的假設後果
提示2：長句型需注意 if 子句與主句的邏輯清晰；避免混用 might have 與 would have 導致邏輯模糊，應根據確定度選擇
